name: module_federation
description: PoC to demonstrate a MFE architecture for an energy management dashboard

scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix=layout & npm run dev --prefix=widgets & npm run dev --prefix=regional-app-1 & npm run dev --prefix=regional-app-2
scripts.build-and-run:layout: docker buildx build -f layout/Dockerfile --progress=plain -t layout:latest . && docker run -t -p 8080:80 layout:latest
